resume_text:
John Doe
Software Engineer

EXPERIENCE
Senior Software Engineer | Tech Corp | 2021-Present
- Developed and deployed 5+ production web applications using Python and React
- Built RESTful APIs serving 100K+ daily requests
- Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions
- Mentored 3 junior developers

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | 2019-2021
- Created responsive web interfaces using React and TypeScript
- Integrated third-party APIs and payment gateways
- Optimized database queries reducing load time by 40%

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | State University | 2019

SKILLS
Programming: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL
Frameworks: Django, Flask, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
Tools: Git, Docker, Linux, VS Code
Cloud: Basic AWS experience (EC2, S3)

PROJECTS
- E-commerce Platform: Built full-stack application with 10K+ users
- Task Management App: React + Django REST API
- Open Source Contributor: 50+ contributions to popular Python libraries
jd_text:
Full Stack Engineer

We're looking for a talented Full Stack Engineer to join our growing team.

RESPONSIBILITIES:
- Design and develop scalable web applications
- Build RESTful APIs and microservices
- Collaborate with product and design teams
- Write clean, maintainable code
- Deploy and monitor production systems

REQUIRED SKILLS:
- 3+ years of software development experience
- Strong proficiency in Python (Django/Flask)
- Experience with React or Vue.js
- Knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases
- Understanding of RESTful API design
- Experience with Git version control

NICE TO HAVE:
- Docker and Kubernetes experience
- AWS or GCP cloud platform knowledge
- CI/CD pipeline setup
- Microservices architecture
- TypeScript experience
- Agile/Scrum methodology

WHAT WE OFFER:
- Competitive salary
- Remote work flexibility
- Health insurance
- Learning and development budget
- Modern tech stack
